lean_install_blocked_reason: Network firewall blocks curl in runner environment. elan download fails on every run. Task 3 deferred until network access available.

targets.name: ArgumentArity
targets.notes: Informal spec extracted and merged (PR #7799). 14 properties across 4 groups. Open question: constructor does not enforce Min <= Max. Next: Task 3 (Lean 4 formal spec). Blocked by Lean toolchain unavailability in CI runner.

targets.name: CommandLineParser.TryUnescape
targets.notes: Informal spec extracted (this run, draft PR). 24 properties across 5 groups. Two confirmed bugs: (1) single-char input '\'' causes ArgumentOutOfRangeException via IndexOf(char,1,-1); (2) single-char input '"' causes range exception via input[1..^1] with start>end. Fix: add length<2 guard. Next: Task 3 (Lean 4 formal spec).

targets.name: CommandLineParser.ParseOptionAndSeparators
targets.notes: Pure inner function. Splits --opt=val into name+arg. Strips leading dashes.

merged_prs.title: [Lean Squad] feat: formal verification infrastructure — research & CI automation

open_prs.title: [Lean Squad] feat(fv): Task 2 — informal spec for CommandLineParser.TryUnescape

next_priority: Task 3: Write Lean 4 formal spec for ArgumentArity (phase 2 -> 3). Then Task 3 for TryUnescape. Both blocked by Lean toolchain. If Lean ever becomes available, start with ArgumentArity.lean using the plan in lean_formal_spec_plan.

approach.rationale: Pure functions, clear algebraic properties, well-documented POSIX/CLI conventions

findings.description: Constructor does not enforce Min <= Max invariant. Ill-formed arities silently accepted.
EC-1: Input consisting of exactly one single-quote character triggers ArgumentOutOfRangeException: IndexOf(char, 1, -1) called when input.Length == 1, count = input.Length - 2 = -1.
findings.fix: Add length < 2 guard before quoted-mode branching

findings.description: EC-2: Input consisting of exactly one double-quote character triggers range exception: input[1..^1] where start=1 > end=0 when input.Length == 1.
findings.fix: Add length < 2 guard before quoted-mode branching

lean_formal_spec_plan.structure: structure ArgumentArity where min : Int; max : Int
theorems: theorem predefined_nonneg_min : for all c in predefined list, c.min >= 0
theorem predefined_wellformed : for all c in predefined list, c.min <= c.max
theorem eq_reflexive : for all a, a = a
theorem eq_symmetric : for all a b, a = b -> b = a
theorem eq_transitive : for all a b c, a = b -> b = c -> a = c
theorem eq_extensional : for all a b, a = b iff a.min = b.min and a.max = b.max
theorem predefined_distinct : all 5 predefined constants are pairwise distinct
lean_formal_spec_plan.approach: Use Int for min/max. Model Int32.MaxValue as 2147483647 concrete value. Use decide for concrete theorems about predefined constants.
